headline: Deploying the research environment
summary: The research scaffold, independent evaluators, storage, and provider boundaries are ready. Modal services are being deployed before M0 begins.

milestones.label: M0
milestones.detail: Data pipeline and GPU contract smoke test

events.title: Deployment started
events.detail: Provider secret detected and service bindings prepared.

events.title: Operator secrets secured
events.detail: Capability tokens and sealed configuration stored in Modal and macOS Keychain.

events.title: Storage created
events.detail: Gateway state, checkpoints, sealed state, and sealed artifacts volumes are online.

events.title: Engineering checks passed
events.detail: Harness, infrastructure, and private evaluator suites are green.

next_action: Finish deploying Modal services, verify the capability endpoints, then start the M0 Codex research run.
